channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz over ceasefire violations: MEHR
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran to close Strait of Hormuz due to Israeli attacks on Lebanon
- Iran closes Strait of Hormuz
- Iran closes Hormuz again after Israel hits Lebanon
- Iran says Hormuz closed as US-Iran deal falters over Lebanon
- Iran closes Strait of Hormuz over ceasefire violations - MEHR
- Iran says Hormuz closed again after Israel strikes Lebanon
- Strait of Hormuz closed again as Lebanon fighting threatens to sink US-Iran talks, which begin Sunday
- Iran says it's closing Strait of Hormuz and accuses US and Israel of violating ceasefire deal
- Iran claims Strait of Hormuz closed in retaliation for US, Israel breaches of MoU
- Iran says Strait of Hormuz will be closed over Israel attacks on Lebanon
- Iran recloses Strait of Hormuz, citing Israeli strikes on Lebanon
- Iran says it's closing the Strait of Hormuz again, blaming Israeli strikes on Lebanon — just days after Trump's deal reopened it
- Iran closes strait again because of Israel-Lebanon fighting
- Iran to close Strait of Hormuz due to Israeli attacks on Lebanon
- Iran shuts Strait of Hormuz as Israel tests MOU with Lebanon strikes
- Iran says Strait of Hormuz will be closed over Israel attacks on Lebanon
- Iran closes Hormuz again over Israel attacks on Lebanon
- Iran closes Hormuz again, accuses US-Israel of violating Lebanon ceasefire
- Iran recloses Strait of Hormuz after Israeli attacks on Lebanon
- Iran says it's closing Strait of Hormuz again
- Strait of Hormuz ‘closed to all vessels’ over Israeli, US violations: Iran’s IRGC
- Iran closes Strait of Hormuz over Israeli attacks in Lebanon as death toll rises
- Iran recloses Strait of Hormuz, citing Israeli strikes on Lebanon
- Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again, alleges US, Israeli violations of ceasefire MOU
- Iran Says It’s Shutting Down Strait Of Hormuz Again
- Iran Says It Closed Strait of Hormuz
- Iran says Hormuz Strait closed over Israel attacks on Lebanon
- Iran says Hormuz closed again after Israel strikes Lebanon
- Iran re-closes Strait of Hormuz after Israeli attacks on Lebanon
- Iran closes Hormuz over Lebanon ceasefire violations
- Iran says it closes Strait of Hormuz again
- Iran says closed Hormuz Strait due to U.S., Israeli "violations" of peace MoU, negotiating team to depart for Switzerland soon -- media
- Urgent: Iran says closed Hormuz Strait due to U.S., Israeli "violations" of peace MoU -- Iran's Mehr news agency
- Flash: Iran says closed Hormuz Strait due to U.S., Israeli "violations" of peace MoU -- Iran's Mehr news agency
- Iran closes Strait of Hormuz after Israel and Hizbollah exchange fire
- Iran claims Strait of Hormuz closed in retaliation for US, Israel breaches of MoU - report
- Iran shuts Strait of Hormuz over Israeli ceasefire violations in Lebanon
- Iran says Hormuz Strait closed over Israel attacks on Lebanon
- Iran closes Strait of Hormuz over Israeli strikes on Lebanon — Command
- Iran to Close Hormuz Strait Over Israeli Lebanon Attacks – Military Command
- Iran says it's closing Strait of Hormuz, citing Israeli strikes on Lebanon]]>

- Bolivia declares state of emergency amid blockade crisis

- Bolivia’s president declares a state of emergency as road blockades choke supplies
